priorities.title: Unescaped user data in innerHTML — XSS risk
priorities.summary: room.id, entry.id, entry.name interpolated raw into innerHTML
priorities.note: room-layout-editor.html:4513–4543. escapeHtml() defined at line 3032 but not used in these locations. XSS via malformed project file.
priorities.solution: Wrap all interpolated values in escapeHtml() at affected lines

priorities.title: Undefined CSS variable --text-dim causes silent render failure
priorities.summary: product-shell.css:585 references var(--text-dim) which is not defined
priorities.note: .marketing-docs-linkout inherits wrong color. No visible error in devtools unless inspecting.
priorities.solution: Define --text-dim in :root token block or replace with var(--muted)

priorities.title: No global :focus-visible rule in room-layout-editor.html
priorities.summary: All native interactive elements lack keyboard focus indicators
priorities.note: Mandatory per CLAUDE.md new-page checklist. One CSS rule at :root level fixes all elements.
priorities.solution: Add :focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(0,232,200,0.35); outline-offset: 2px; } to room-layout-editor.html

opportunities.title: Extract shared CSS token block → tokens.css
opportunities.summary: Eliminate manual token sync across 3+ HTML files
opportunities.note: Currently every HTML page duplicates the full :root { } token block. A single tokens.css would be the source of truth.
opportunities.solution: Create tokens.css, import via <link> in all HTML pages, remove inline :root blocks

opportunities.title: Extract JS from room-layout-editor.html
opportunities.summary: 9,607-line monolith with ~7,500 lines of inline JS
opportunities.note: Inline JS prevents security auditing, makes version control diffs unreadable, and blocks any future bundling/testing.
opportunities.solution: Extract JS to room-layout-editor.js, load via <script src>

opportunities.title: Create shared nav.css
opportunities.summary: .site-nav styles duplicated between room editor and sprite workbench
opportunities.note: Both tools have near-identical .site-nav CSS. A shared file would keep them in sync.
opportunities.solution: Extract to nav.css, import in both tools

opportunities.title: Align product-shell.css marketing section to design tokens
opportunities.summary: ~15 hardcoded colors and ~12 rem font sizes outside the token system
opportunities.note: The marketing/splash section of product-shell.css predates the token system. It uses arbitrary hex values and rem units.
opportunities.solution: Audit and migrate each color to the nearest CSS variable; replace rem sizes with var(--font-size-*)

opportunities.title: Standardise sprite workbench radius tokens
opportunities.note: Canonical: --radius-sm: 8px, --radius-md: 10px. The sprite workbench redefines them at a local :root, causing downstream confusion.
opportunities.solution: Remove local overrides; use canonical values or introduce named aliases specific to this tool

opportunities.title: Passive income market scan delivered — pick first revenue experiment
opportunities.summary: Library report covers itch.io asset economics, AI and education products, and platform fees
opportunities.note: Executive summary emailed to founder. Full findings in research library. Finance should model net revenue at a few price points; founder chooses one first SKU (small pack vs. short guide).
opportunities.solution: Orchestrator runs decision mode; founder approves first experiment and time budget
